action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 15's training crashed with a DDP 'unused parameters' error (parameters 0-99 got no gradients), almost certainly because the incomplete train.py froze the CLIP backbone. Our best test macro_f1 is still 0.4197 from checkpoints_v2/best.pt (linear head, 10 epochs). Analysis: To push higher, we need a clean train.py that (1) never freezes parameters (avoiding the DDP error), (2) uses differential LR instead, (3) warm-starts the ViT-L/14 backbone from checkpoints_v2/best.pt, (4) attaches a new 2-layer MLP head, and (5) uses cosine warmup, RandAugment, label smoothing, and class-weighted CE. With ~2.85 h left, a 10–12 epoch run should take ~1.5 h. Decision: Rewrite train.py completely with mp.spawn, strict localhost DDP, find_unused_parameters=True for safety, and no frozen weights. Launch a 1-epoch smoke test now to verify the pipeline; if it passes, launch the full run next iteration.
